response.name: Get Webhook Spec

header.value: GET, PUT, POST, DELETE, PATCH, OPTIONS

exec: if (!secret) { throw new Error('DPP_WEBHOOK_SECRET is not set'); }
// Source payload comes from the dppPayload variable (resolve any {{vars}} inside it).
// Body tab is {{dppBody}}, so Postman sends exactly this string.

request.description:
Ingests Digital Product Passport (DPP) data into the system via a registered webhook connection. This endpoint receives structured product data payloads from external partners or internal services and processes them as upsert operations against the DPP data store.

## Endpoint

`POST {{baseUrl}}/webhooks/dpps/:connectionId`

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `connectionId` | The unique identifier of the registered webhook connection (e.g. `01KTX7DVTM1SE2F1VYD256FT8A`). |

## Request Headers

| Header | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `Content-Type` | Yes | Must be `application/json`. |
| `X-DPP-Timestamp` | Yes | ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the request was generated (e.g. `2026-06-12T07:41:42.301Z`). Used for replay-attack prevention. |
| `X-DPP-Signature` | Yes | HMAC signature of the request payload, used to verify the authenticity and integrity of the incoming data. |

## Request Body

The body must be a JSON object conforming to the DPP message envelope schema.

### Top-Level Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `specVersion` | string | Yes | Version of the DPP message specification (e.g. `"1.0"`). |
| `messageId` | string | Yes | A unique identifier for this message, used for deduplication (e.g. `"unique-msg-id-013"`). |
| `timestamp` | string (ISO 8601) | Yes | The timestamp at which the data event occurred. |
| `operation` | string | Yes | The operation type. Currently supported: `"upsert"`. |
| `data` | object | Yes | The DPP data payload. See sections below. |

### `data.materialsAndComposition`

Contains material composition and hazardous substance information.

#### `sections.materials.fields`

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `batteryChemistry` | string | The battery chemistry type (e.g. `"Lithium Iron Phosphate (LFP)"`). |
| `criticalRawMaterial` | string | The critical raw material used (e.g. `"Lithium"`). |

#### `sections.hazardousSubstance.fields`

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | Name of the hazardous substance (e.g. `"Cobalt"`). |
| `impact` | string | Environmental or health impact description. |
| `location` | string | Location of the substance within the product (e.g. `"Battery Cathode"`). |
| `indentifiers` | string | CAS number or other substance identifier (e.g. `"CAS-7440-48-4"`). |
| `hazardousClasses` | string | Hazard classification (e.g. `"Acute Toxicity Category 4"`). |
| `concentrationRange` | number | Concentration of the substance as a percentage (e.g. `8.5`). |

### `data.generalProductAndManufacturerInfo`

Contains general product and manufacturer details.

#### `sections.productAndManufacturerInformation.fields`

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `gtin` | string | Global Trade Item Number (e.g. `"09506000123456"`). |
| `productName` | string | Human-readable product name (e.g. `"Cleantron Battery Pack - 13"`). |
| `productSerialNumber` | string | Unique serial number for this product unit. |
| `productBatchNumber` | string | Batch/lot number for traceability. |
| `productModelNumber` | string | Model number (e.g. `"EVBP-60-LFP"`). |
| `productWeight` | number | Product weight in grams (e.g. `420`). |
| `manufactureDate` | string (ISO 8601) | Date of manufacture (e.g. `"2026-01-15"`). |
| `manufacturePlace` | string | Location where the product was manufactured. |
| `manufacturerIdentification` | string | Internal manufacturer ID (e.g. `"MFG-BD-001"`). |
| `expiryDate` | string (ISO 8601) | Product expiry date (e.g. `"2035-12-31"`). |
| `productImage` | string (URL) | URL to an image of the product. |

## Example Response

```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "inboxId": "01KTXCFX6Q5W113R3Q257V4WWA",
    "duplicate": false
  },
  "metadata": {
    "timestamp": "2026-06-12T07:42:07.076Z",
    "requestId": "req_01KTXCFX6GVJSEEVZT8R6QB6HN"
  }
}
```

| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| `data.inboxId` | The unique ID assigned to this ingested message in the DPP inbox. |
| `data.duplicate` | `true` if a message with the same `messageId` was already processed; `false` otherwise. |
| `metadata.timestamp` | Server-side processing timestamp. |
| `metadata.requestId` | Unique server-side request trace ID. |
